properties.description: Always-on Discord gateway for Gemini CLI. Bidirectional chat, conversation memory, streaming responses.

properties.responsibility: Owns Discord client, queue, persistent memory, and localhost control API.
Registers tools and can auto-start the daemon.

properties.description: Shows daemon health, memory scope, and allowlist/routing state.
Sends a message to an allowed guild channel or enabled DM target.
Replies to a specific message ID in Discord.
Returns recent exchanges, participant/channel context, and message IDs.
Restarts the daemon after configuration or runtime issues.
